title: pyrrosia subfurfuracea
intro: Pyrrosia subfurfuracea, also known as the rusty back polypody, is a species of fern native to China, Taiwan, and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Pyrrosia subfurfuracea include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Pyrrosia subfurfuracea is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
